accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; the description of interim payment rules and the interest waiver condition is correct.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated content; all claims trace to the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as setting procedures and deadlines for royalty reporting when allocation is undetermined.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Implicitly describes the amendment to the Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Correctly notes the Indian lands exclusion and the interest waiver condition.

effective_dates.why: No effective date stated; the bill simply says 'Approved September 20, 2024' and the summary correctly notes no separate effective date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all key elements: 120-day deadline, interim reporting, correction window, interest waiver, and Indian lands exclusion.

concise.why: Appropriately concise for the bill's complexity.

correct_entities.why: Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act and Secretary of the Interior correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 120-day deadline and third-month correction window are accurate.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
